Sound of Text

  • What's New

Sound of Text

Free

Turn any written text into natural-sounding speech instantly using Google Translate's powerful TTS engine and download it as an MP3 file. Widely used for creating custom voice messages on WhatsApp, generating viral TikTok audio, supporting classroom learning, and making content more accessible. Supports dozens of languages and accents — trusted by millions of users worldwide for quick, reliable, high-quality voice synthesis.

Features of Sound of Text

Text-to-Speech Technology

Sound of Text utilizes Google Translate text-to-speech technology to transform written text into spoken words.

MP3 Output Format

Generates high-quality MP3 audio files as the output format, making it convenient for various applications and offline listening.

Education & Tutorials

Teachers can convert lesson plans into audio format, cater to different learning styles, and create audio flashcards for memorization.

Business & Promotions

Develop audio advertisements or product demos to engage customers and enhance marketing campaigns with unique audio content.

Social Media & TikTok

Perfect for creating viral TikTok videos and other social media content, becoming increasingly popular among teenagers.

Document Accessibility

Makes written documents, articles, and blog posts accessible to individuals with visual or reading disabilities.

Personalized Messages

Craft personalized audio messages, including greeting cards or voicemail greetings with unique voice synthesis.

Global Convenience

Generated MP3 files are easy to download and distribute, allowing users to review content on the go.

Reliable Service

Trusted by millions for consistent processing and high-quality voice synthesis across dozens of global languages.

Inspired by millions of Sound of Text users around the world.
